title: sida confinis
intro: Sida confinis, also known as the Indian milkweed or sida plant, is a perennial herb belonging to the Malvaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and dermatitis, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sida confinis include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Traditionally, Sida confinis is prepared as a paste or infused oil for topical application, or as a decoction for internal use.
